title: Monthly Eva Store Illustrations
wikitext:
[]: Monthly Eva Store Illustrations             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 16, 2011 11:59 pm So it seems like Eva Store has some monthly ( I think ) drawings of the characters up. Despite their somewhat frustrating/for the worst layout changes, this is one nice thing. First up is Asuka and Rei, who based on their plugsuit waist lines, could use a few sammichs: If I find out more info about this, I'll post it here.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Jan 17, 2011 8:40 am Well, their waist wasn't exactly normal even in Sadamoto's drawings ; anyway thanks for the info, I wouldn't have noticed since I don't check the Eva Store regularly.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jan 17, 2011 9:32 am I did some searching on Eva Store's blog and it seems they'll be having a few of these illustrations for the public to welcome in the New Year (and something about "system circumstances"..I guess thanking people's patience with the redesign of the store a few months back). By the way, you're welcome.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Feb 05, 2011 11:36 am Yep, a new month, a new image. This time of Eva-01 in all her glory: My fingers are crossed that the eventual Shinji image will look decent.

[]: Something involving nekomimi and Kaworu, maybe...?             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sun Feb 06, 2011 7:15 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: My fingers are crossed that the eventual Shinji image will look decent.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Mar 15, 2011 10:16 am This month's illustration: Dat Mari. (I'm sure Killer Bee loves this one. ) I'm guessing next month's illustration will be either rouge element number 2 (Kaworu) or maybe even Baka-Shinji. On the off-chance that Photobucket is resizing these images when it claims it's not, just grab the current image from here: http://www.evastore.jp

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Tue Mar 15, 2011 1:27 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Yep, a new month, a new image. This time of Eva-01 in all her glory: SPOILER: Show

[]: And yes, Photobucket resized the pic.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Tue Mar 15, 2011 3:05 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: This month's illustration: Dat Mari. (I'm sure Killer Bee loves this one. )

[]: Re: And yes, Photobucket resized the pic.             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 15, 2011 9:32 pm Killer Bee wrote: Is Special Illust short for Special Illustration or Special Illustrious?

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Tue Mar 15, 2011 11:41 pm toe mash wrote: Wow, that's badass also a great "haters gonna hate" pic

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Wed Mar 16, 2011 6:16 am Fireand'chutes77 wrote: Done.

[]: Maybe I should've used more emoticons...?             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Wed Mar 16, 2011 10:55 pm Reichu wrote: The abbreviated katakana form of "illustration" in normal use is "irasuto" (-->illust), so yeah.

[]: Re: Maybe I should've used more emoticons...?             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 16, 2011 11:12 pm Killer Bee wrote: That was a joke.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Mar 31, 2011 8:55 pm Poor Eva-00! Anorexia is NOT the answer!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon May 02, 2011 5:33 pm Natural progression of things: Instead of Rei and Asuka fondling each other, it's Kaworu and Shinji. Normal size pic here (since Photobucket resizes stuff): http://www.evastore.jp/

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Mon May 02, 2011 5:38 pm I took a gander and noticed that they have plugsuits and figures up to EVA-05! They also have the Mark 06 shillouetted!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon May 02, 2011 9:12 pm I wish all these pics were bigger. These are uselessly small at only 900px high. Hopefully there's an artbook of these somewhere down the line.

[]: Or Minidisc. Those are sure to catch on.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Sun May 08, 2011 10:12 am Shogo-Kun wrote: I took a gander and noticed that they have plugsuits and figures up to EVA-05! They also have the Mark 06 shillouetted!

[]: Re: Monthly Eva Store Illustrations             Quote Post by Sun Stealer » Tue May 10, 2011 6:15 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: First up is Asuka and Rei, who based on their plugsuit waist lines, could use a few sammichs

[]: Re: Monthly Eva Store Illustrations             Quote Post by bladerj » Tue May 10, 2011 8:38 pm Sun Stealer wrote: I'm confused. Are you saying the picture should have them holding/eating sandwiches, that the picture should be on the packaging for a sandwich, or that evastore.jp should be selling sandwiches?
summary: []: Monthly Eva Store Illustrations             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jan 16, 2011 11:59 pm So it seems like Eva Store has some monthly ( I think ) drawings of the characters up. Despite their somewhat frustrating/for the worst layout changes, this is one nice thing. First up is Asuka and Rei, who based on their plugsuit waist lines, could use a few sammichs: If I find out more info about this, I'll post it here.
